channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pot hole on speed bump, 4th July
item.description:
This has been her for over a month and getting worse causing damage to car

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: "Statutory light nuisance from street lamp outside 5 Green Lane, SE9 2AF, 4th July
item.description:
I am reporting a statutory light nuisance caused by the LED street lamp located directly outside my property. This has been an ongoing problem for a significant amount of time, and the intensity of this light is excessive; it is beaming directly into my bedroom window and illuminating the room even with my blinds fully closed, as shown in the attached photos. This persistent light intrusion is causing severe sleep deprivation and significantly impacting my health. An adjustment to the angle will not resolve this. I am formally requesting the installation of a house-side shield (cowl) on this unit to stop the light trespass into my home. I would appreciate your assistance in resolving this matter as soon as possible.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on grass verge between grays farm school and Kemnal school, 4th July
item.description:
Now the grass has been cut. It has exposed vast amounts of litter on the grass verge between the two schools.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenoaks Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several areas of Sandy lane covered in litter ., 4th July
item.description:
Extensive litter in several areas of Sandy lane. Very bad at the moment. Including discarded bag of wire in road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole outside 68 Glengall, 4th July
item.description:
Deep pothole outside 68 Glengall Causing damage to cars, very noisy with trucks hitting it - been there for 2 months
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 64 Glengall Road, 4th July
item.description:
Bags of garden waste left on pavement outside 64 Glengall Road NW6
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.description:
Left on the corner of Plumstead common rd near the ship pub. Has come from one of the flats. Benn there a while

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead

item.title: Weeds, 3rd July

Weeds growing on the pavement all up the street.

item.title: Street Light not working Pole 18J1492, 3rd July
item.description:
The Street light does not come on at Night. this happens every month or every other month -0 always this light near 93 Westcombe Hill SE3 7DU pole number 18J 1492

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken street name sign, 3rd July
item.description:
The 'Arthurdon Road' street name sign is broken, this is at the junction of Chudleigh Road and Arthurdon Road, on right hand side of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arthurdon Road, Ladywell, Greater London

item.title: Dumped chair outside 2 heathfield road, br13rn, 3rd July
item.description:
Someone has dumped a chair outside 2 heathfield road, br13rn
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Mattress dumped, 3rd July
item.description:
Mattress dumped in the front, extremely overgrown garden on the corner of Kirkdale and Newman Close, potential home for rats and mice, therefore a health and safety hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peak Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree suckers, 3rd July
item.description:
Walking down Jews Walk from Kirkdale, on the left hand side of the road, the pollarded trees have lots of suckers that need cutting back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jews Walk, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign v Road Works, 3rd July
item.description:
There is a sign at the Abbey Wood Road end of De Lucy stating that De Lucy is to be closed for the whole day on 20 July. The sign does not say what for. Today, with no warning, a road works crew pull up on Abbey Grove and, dug up old tarmac and relayed an area of De Lucy has shown in pics. Is the rest of De Lucy to be tarmac on 20 July and is it cost effective to work piece-meal like this?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Lucy Street, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd July
item.description:
A broken dining chair has been left near the former water fountain, on the corner of Jews Walk and Kirkdale
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jews Walk, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 street lights and refuge lighting at the bottom of Downs Hill not working, 3rd July
item.description:
The first street light of Downs Hill has not worked for a few weeks; tonight I noticed that neither the next light nor pedesriran refuge light were working. It's very dark here. Can you fix as a priority please?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downs Hill, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the bus shelter, 3rd July
item.description:
Graffiti on the bus shelter
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kirkdale, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Several black bags of Rubbish, 3rd July
item.description:
These bags of refuse have been there for a few days. It would have been good if they were collected today (Friday), in Black bin round but they have been left to be further rummaged through and strewn about by animals. Needs collection asap. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Grove, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet
